name: Bank Reconciliation Workflow
description: Step-by-step process to reconcile book balances against bank statements

steps.label: Select Bank Account & Period
steps.description: Choose the bank account (COA code) and statement period end date

steps.label: Load Book Transactions
steps.description: Pull all posted journal lines for the bank account up to period date
steps.source: journals.lines where account_code = bank_account AND posted = true AND date <= period_date

steps.label: Mark Cleared Items
steps.description: Tick each book transaction that appears on the bank statement

steps.label: Enter Bank-Only Items
steps.description: Add items on the bank statement not yet in the books (bank charges, interest)

steps.label: Verify Reconciliation
steps.description: Adjusted book balance must equal adjusted bank balance

steps.label: Finalize & Print Report
steps.description: Lock the reconciliation and produce the reconciliation statement
